item.title: The Chilling Story of Richard Ramirez
item.description: This episode examines the crimes of Richard Ramirez, known as the “Night Stalker,” and the investigation that led to his eventual capture after a series of attacks across California.

media:content.media:title: The Chilling Story of Richard Ramirez
media:content.media:description: This episode examines the crimes of Richard Ramirez, known as the “Night Stalker,” and the investigation that led to his eventual capture after a series of attacks across California.

item.title: He Manipulated His Doctors: Ed Kemper’s Story
item.description: This episode explores the life and crimes of Edmund Kemper, examining how he manipulated psychologists and authorities while committing a series of murders that shocked the United States.

media:content.media:title: He Manipulated His Doctors: Ed Kemper’s Story
media:content.media:description: This episode explores the life and crimes of Edmund Kemper, examining how he manipulated psychologists and authorities while committing a series of murders that shocked the United States.

item.title: The Mysterious Story Of Holly Bartlett
item.description: This episode examines the unexplained death of Holly Bartlett in Halifax, a case that raised questions and sparked ongoing discussion about the circumstances surrounding her final hours.

media:content.media:title: The Mysterious Story Of Holly Bartlett
media:content.media:description: This episode examines the unexplained death of Holly Bartlett in Halifax, a case that raised questions and sparked ongoing discussion about the circumstances surrounding her final hours.

item.title: The Tragic Neubauer Twin Study
item.description: This episode explores the controversial Neubauer Twin Study conducted by Peter B. Neubauer, where identical twins and triplets were secretly separated at birth as part of a long-hidden psychological experiment.

media:content.media:title: The Tragic Neubauer Twin Study
media:content.media:description: This episode explores the controversial Neubauer Twin Study conducted by Peter B. Neubauer, where identical twins and triplets were secretly separated at birth as part of a long-hidden psychological experiment.

item.title: Fred West's Past Was Darker Than You Think
item.description: This episode examines the disturbing background and crimes of Fred West, exploring how his past and actions shocked the United Kingdom and left a lasting impact on true crime history.

media:content.media:title: Fred West's Past Was Darker Than You Think
media:content.media:description: This episode examines the disturbing background and crimes of Fred West, exploring how his past and actions shocked the United Kingdom and left a lasting impact on true crime history.

item.title: The Murderer of the Starved Rock Case Released After 60 Years
item.description: This episode examines the developments in the historic Starved Rock Murders case, including the release of Chester Weger after decades in prison and the continuing debate surrounding the investigation.

media:content.media:title: The Murderer of the Starved Rock Case Released After 60 Years
media:content.media:description: This episode examines the developments in the historic Starved Rock Murders case, including the release of Chester Weger after decades in prison and the continuing debate surrounding the investigation.

item.title: The Chilling Phantom Who Went Uncaught For Years
item.description: This episode examines the crimes of Israel Keyes, whose calculated methods allowed him to evade capture for years before investigators finally connected the evidence.

media:content.media:title: The Chilling Phantom Who Went Uncaught For Years
media:content.media:description: This episode examines the crimes of Israel Keyes, whose calculated methods allowed him to evade capture for years before investigators finally connected the evidence.

item.title: The Solved Mystery Of Marie Antoinette's Missing Items
item.description: This episode explores the historical mystery surrounding missing belongings linked to Marie Antoinette and how researchers eventually uncovered clues that helped solve the decades-old puzzle.

media:content.media:title: The Solved Mystery Of Marie Antoinette's Missing Items
media:content.media:description: This episode explores the historical mystery surrounding missing belongings linked to Marie Antoinette and how researchers eventually uncovered clues that helped solve the decades-old puzzle.
